chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 2068 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.10248/2018 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 21-09-2022 Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioners. Mr. Mian Imtiaz Ali Qureshi, Advocate, files powers on behalf of respondents-Pakistan Railways, which are taken on record. The petitioners, who were appointed as Muawans and Labourers in Concrete Sleeper Factory of Pakistan Railways in Sukkur, through instant petition, have sought, inter alia, regularization of their services on their respective posts. Today, para wise comments are filed on behalf of respondent No.2 / General Manager Manufacturing & Services (G.M. M&S), Pakistan Railways Headquarters Office, Lahore. Perusal thereof shows that the petitioners were engaged purely on temporary basis for a period of 89 days against the requirement of unskilled worker for manufacturing / prestressing of sleepers as and when required to achieve the target. It further appears that the petitioners were disengaged / discontinued after June 2017 on the completion of assigned target for manufacturing of the sleepers for the financial year 2016-17. Since the services of the petitioners were hired purely on temporary / need basis for the targeted work, they cannot claim their regularization in Pakistan Railways; hence, this petition, being devoid of merits, is dismissed accordingly along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
